Description: I am Rral Br'aax, monument to physical training and terror to new recruits. My purpose is to bequeath the burning spirit of the Landsguard upon all who would accept it. Thus, I require a shield worthy of the Landsguard name, one that will humble even the most foolhardy novice.

I am Br'uk Br'aax, monument to physical training and terror to new recruits. My purpose is to bequeath the burning spirit of the Landsguard upon all who would accept it. Thus, I require a shield worthy of the Landsguard name, one that will humble even the most foolhardy novice.
